message:
test(coordinator): add conflict formatting, digest markdown, status mapping, and quality monitoring tests

Expand coordinator test coverage across three test files:

conflicts_test.go:
- TestFormatNegotiationRequest: verify conflict negotiation message includes
  all required sections (header, pattern, requester, options, acknowledge)
- TestFormatNegotiationRequest_NoReason: omit Reason line when holder has none
- TestFormatConflictNotification: verify multi-holder notification with
  exactly 1 Reason line (only for holders that have one)
- TestFormatConflictNotification_EmptyHolders: valid markdown with no holders
- TestMatchesSuffixPattern_TooFewSegments: path shorter than suffix pattern

coordinator_test.go:
- TestMapStatusToRobotState: status.StateIdle→robot.StateWaiting,
  StateWorking→StateGenerating, StateError→StateError, StateUnknown and
  arbitrary strings→StateUnknown
- TestFormatDigestMarkdown: full digest with agent table, no error emoji
  when ErrorCount=0, agent name appears in output
- TestFormatDigestMarkdown_WithErrors: error count with warning emoji,
  alerts section with error and context-usage alerts
- TestFormatDigestMarkdown_IdleForDash: empty IdleFor renders as "-"

quality_test.go:
- IsUBSAvailable, GetLastScanResult, GetAgentMetrics
- ErrorHistoryLimit, UpdateErrorTrend, UpdateContextTrend

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
